name: users_delete
description: Delete or disassociate a user from the Zoom account. Choose to transfer meetings, webinars, and recordings to another user.

parameters.name: transfer_email
parameters.description: Email of user to transfer meetings, webinars, and recordings to.

parameters.name: transfer_meetings
parameters.description: Transfer scheduled meetings to the specified user.

parameters.name: transfer_webinars
parameters.description: Transfer webinars to the specified user.

parameters.name: transfer_recordings
parameters.description: Transfer recordings to the specified user.
